work_unit: MM-M011: can_match blocks Limit buy/sell at limit_up/down contradicting risk.rs contract
situation: engine.rs L796-803 can_match returned false for ALL buys when last_price >= limit_up, regardless of order type. risk.rs validate_buy (L83-92) explicitly permits Limit buy AT limit_up (rejects only reference_price > limit_up for Limit). Symmetric issue on sell side with limit_down. Result: valid Limit orders at the boundary price could never fill despite passing risk check — silent order stranding.
action: Refactored can_match Buy/Sell arms to gate the limit-up/limit-down block on Market order type only. Limit orders rely on existing price comparison (order.price < last_price for Buy, > for Sell) which naturally handles the boundary correctly per A-share matching rules. Added inline comment citing risk.rs contract to prevent future regression.
outcome_evidence: cargo check -p moni-engine passed (Finished dev profile in 2.82s). Commit 76129f4 pushed to origin/auto/opt-moni-master-1783105913. Reuses existing worktree from prior MM-H001/MM-M006/MM-M007 fixes (same engine area).
next_suggestion: 派生下一个 pending finding: MM-L001 (engine.rs L599-600 unwrap_or defaults mask corrupted order side/type)
继续消化 audit-2026-07-04-002 剩余 8 条 pending findings

audit_findings.finding: can_match blocked ALL buys at limit_up and ALL sells at limit_down without distinguishing Limit vs Market order type. Contradicts risk.rs validate_buy/validate_sell which allow Limit orders AT the boundary price. Causes valid Limit orders to be permanently stranded after passing risk check.
audit_findings.remediation: Gate limit_up/limit_down block on Market order type only; let Limit orders flow through to price comparison which correctly handles boundary per A-share matching rules.
